recap: Added 9 placeholder icon keys (value X) to icons.zsh; bats renamed from language-bats; pre-existing missingIconsLoad lint error suppressed via disable comment.

Migrated all 10 git compdef functions to $COLORS[key]/$ICONS[key]; added colors-load-definitions+icons-load-definitions; replaced hardcoded glyphs with $ICONS[git-commit]; split long _describe lines into local label+header vars to satisfy 100-char lint limit.

Migrated all 8 docker compdef functions to $COLORS[key]/$ICONS[key]; added colors-load-definitions+icons-load-definitions; split long _describe lines into local label+header vars to satisfy 100-char lint limit.
